title: cornalia glabra
intro: Cornalia glabra, also known as Cornaline or Glabrous Cornalia, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Cornalia in the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Cornalia glabra include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Cornalia glabra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
